title: very simple Dockerfile build fails
body:
simple yum install on centos:6.9 fails on podman but not on docker

3 Files in directory ./test 

```
= Dockerfile ==================================
FROM centos:6.9
MAINTAINER tim.thawkins@gmail.com

RUN yum -y install  \
glibc-common
===========================================
=builddocker.sh===============================
#!/bin/sh
docker build -t test-image-docker .
===========================================
=buildpodman.sh===============================
#!/bin/sh
podman build -t test-image-docker .
===========================================
[thawkins@timdev05 test]$ uname -a
Linux timdev05 4.20.7-200.fc29.x86_64 #1 SMP Wed Feb 6 19:16:42 UTC 2019 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

comments.body:
same problem is in 'master' 

[thawkins@timdev05 cd-php5.3]$ podman version
Version:            1.0.1-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.5
Git Commit:         81ace5caaca844eda4be48245590ea54bdd0cba3
Built:              Fri Feb 15 13:28:41 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
[thawkins@timdev05 cd-php5.3]$

It looks like you are running in rootless mode.  Can you try with: https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2019-c971e221e8 ?

We had some fixes related to "ulimit -n" for the unprivileged fuse-overlayfs.  I think this is what you are hitting

> It looks like you are running in rootless mode. Can you try with: https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/FEDORA-2019-c971e221e8 ?

I am hitting the same error, investigating it
